list.title: Users retrieved successfully
list.description: The list of users has been retrieved successfully.

fetched.title: User details retrieved
fetched.description: The user details have been retrieved successfully.

created.title: User created successfully
created.description: The user has been created successfully.

updated.title: User updated successfully
updated.description: The user has been updated successfully.

password_updated.title: Password updated successfully
password_updated.description: Your password has been updated successfully.

deleted.title: User deleted successfully
deleted.description: The user has been deleted successfully.

pagination.title: User pagination retrieved successfully
pagination.description: The pagination information for users has been retrieved successfully.

limits.title: User limits retrieved successfully
limits.description: The limits information for users has been retrieved successfully.

hateoas.title: User links retrieved successfully
hateoas.description: The HATEOAS links for users have been retrieved successfully.

not_found.title: User not found
not_found.description: The requested user could not be found.

password_not_set.title: Password not set
password_not_set.description: This user does not have a password set.

password_too_short.title: Password too short
password_too_short.description: The password must be at least 8 characters long.

old_password_incorrect.title: Old password incorrect
old_password_incorrect.description: The current password you entered is incorrect.

username_too_short.title: Username too short
username_too_short.description: Username must be at least 3 characters long.

username_invalid.title: Username invalid
username_invalid.description: Username can contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.

email_invalid.title: Email invalid
email_invalid.description: Please provide a valid lowercase email address.

validation.username_format: may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.username_or_email_format: must be a valid username or lowercase email address.
validation.person_name_format: must contain only valid name characters.
validation.name_format: may contain only letters, numbers, spaces, dots, underscores, and hyphens.
validation.password_complexity: must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.
